name: Happy Pee Time: VR Brain Puzzle
summary: Aim, draw, and solve the splash! In Happy Pee Time: VR Brain Puzzle, you use your creativity to guide the stream into the target through crazy physics puzzles. Sketch lines in 3D to bypass obstacles and complete the mission in this hilarious and addictive VR experience. It is a lighthearted challenge that tests your physics skills and your sense of humor. Can you master the flow?
